chapter_title: Driving Under the Influence of Intoxicants
text: When a person is arraigned on a charge of driving while under the influence of intoxicants in violation of ORS 813.010 (Driving under the influence of intoxicants) , a court shall ensure that the defendant submits to booking, if the person has not already been booked on that charge. [2015 c.145 §2]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 813. Driving Under the Influence of Intoxicants
##### § 813.017 — Arraignment

When a person is arraigned on a charge of driving while under the influence of intoxicants in violation of ORS 813.010 (Driving under the influence of intoxicants) , a court shall ensure that the defendant submits to booking, if the person has not already been booked on that charge. [2015 c.145 §2]

subsections.text: When a person is arraigned on a charge of driving while under the influence of intoxicants in violation of ORS 813.010 (Driving under the influence of intoxicants) , a court shall ensure that the defendant submits to booking, if the person has not already been booked on that charge. [2015 c.145 §2]
